data.general: Expect a sudden change in your social life due to unexpected travel or invitation, Sagittarius. Mercury's position in your 7th house suggests that this change may come through a communication or a message. You might feel a bit anxious but it's a good opportunity to expand your horizons.
data.luck: Your luck is tied to your communication skills and how you respond to unexpected situations, Dhanu. Jupiter's placement in the 8th house can bring both good and bad luck, so be cautious but also open-minded.
data.scope: Your current focus should be on relationships and partnerships, Sagittarius. Venus in the 9th house indicates that you're in a good place to explore new connections and opportunities.
data.study: You might experience a bit of a mental block when it comes to learning new things, Dhanu. Mars' position in the 6th house can make you feel restless or impatient, but try to stay focused and you'll overcome this obstacle.
data.love: Romantic relationships are on the rise for you, Sagittarius. Jupiter's influence in the 8th house can bring new love interests or deepen existing relationships. Be open to new experiences and emotions.
data.travel: Travel plans are likely to be disrupted or changed suddenly, Dhanu. Mercury's placement in the 7th house suggests that you might receive an unexpected invitation or message that changes your travel plans.
